creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

The checksum of the distfile was incorrect.
Perhaps the mastersite silently changed the distfile?
Please use the following patch instead.

- -- llwang

diff -urN py-numpy.orig/Makefile py-numpy/Makefile
- --- py-numpy.orig/Makefile	2009-09-12 19:07:52.000000000 -0500
+++ py-numpy/Makefile	2010-01-10 20:09:53.815174572 -0600
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	numpy
- -PORTVERSION=	1.3.0
- -PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.0
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	math python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://numpy.scipy.org/:doc \
diff -urN py-numpy.orig/distinfo py-numpy/distinfo
- --- py-numpy.orig/distinfo	2009-07-13 04:44:48.000000000 -0500
+++ py-numpy/distinfo	2010-01-10 20:10:10.015918226 -0600
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
- -MD5 (numpy-1.3.0.tar.gz) = 3f7773ff0971a5ebb8591536d8ec7bd6
- -SHA256 (numpy-1.3.0.tar.gz) = 7524687cce85aa78103046db5e617c626b0ef871a203a049159f88f35647c90d
- -SIZE (numpy-1.3.0.tar.gz) = 1995868
+MD5 (numpy-1.4.0.tar.gz) = 6d0ea698beda38109796240d08ecb296
+SHA256 (numpy-1.4.0.tar.gz) = b8dbdb2c8459699b4021b72237222e4b7314d0bacecce5951a6a1318de32270d
+SIZE (numpy-1.4.0.tar.gz) = 2215411

 SHA256 (numpybook.pdf) = 8c9692db7373838c585073e4141ae4bd3b8793dffd59ce3544bf851e71e9b865
 SIZE (numpybook.pdf) = 2148630
